headline: Campus Sexual Harassment Cases Rise 67% With Few Consequences
context: University disciplinary records show a 67% increase in reported sexual harassment between 2023 and 2025.

cards.big: Campus sexual harassment reports rose 67% from 2023 to 2025 across public universities
cards.sub: Only 12% of cases resulted in disciplinary action against perpetrators

cards.big: Anti-Sexual Harassment Act 2022 applies to workplaces but has unclear campus jurisdiction
cards.sub: Universities rely on internal codes of conduct with inconsistent definitions

cards.big: 68% of female students in 2025 AWAM survey reported experiencing harassment on campus
cards.sub: Most incidents go unreported due to fear of retaliation or disbelief

cards.big: US Title IX mandates dedicated campus coordinators and formal investigation procedures
cards.sub: Institutional frameworks reduce reporting barriers and improve response times

cards.big: A campus that does not protect students from harassment is not safe for learning
Should universities be legally required to have independent sexual harassment investigation units
